jobDescription: We are notonthehighstreet. Home to over 5000 of the UK’s best small creative businesses, we have been changing the online retail landscape since 2006. Whether you’re working with our Partners to help grow their business, or behind the scenes developing code, we are continuously innovating & working on some really cool stuff all at the same time. And the best bit? We’re making a difference to our Partners’ lives as we do it. What do we need? It’s an exciting time for the Data team here at Notonthehighstreet and we’re on the lookout for a Data Engineer to join us! We’ve just completed the first phase of our new data platform with best-in-class cloud native technologies at the core. We are now building on that foundation to produce exciting data products for the wider business.  With increased investment in the data team and the value of data being recognised across the organisation, this is quite the perfect time to join the Team. Some of the things you’ll be doing You will be helping to develop a new Data Science platform for our Data Scientists; this will include both the infrastructure for model training and the applications to serve up those models to both internal and external consumers.  We also have many exciting projects in the pipeline, now that we have the core data infrastructure in place! Some Key Skills + Experience You'll Need - Essential Skills Python SQLETL Development Data Warehouse Experience Version Control Experience (git, svn) Public Cloud Experience Ability to work independently and as part of a team Ability to communicate with business stakeholders ...it also would be good if you have... Snowflake data warehouse Spark/ Databricks Working with data scientists Airflow Fivetran Product information models DBTAWSJira What we can offer you Because we know how important learning is, we provide the Tech team with online training and time set aside to complete course work, guilds sessions, hackathons and learning groups. On top of this, we offer plenty of fun stuff - staff discount, birthday vouchers, soft/hot drinks on tap, regular Friday drinks and of course our renowned Christmas and Summer parties. As the home of thoughtful gifts, ‘thoughtful’ is our middle name so we also love a surprise or two… (but that’s enough on that for now!) Our perks It’s important to us that our people are well looked after, which is why we offer everyone BUPA healthcare, life insurance and a pension plan. Because having a break is important for your physical and mental wellbeing, our holiday allowance is 25 days (plus bank holidays) AND your entitlement will increase an extra day for every 2 years you spend with us. Apply to join #teamnoths We’d love to hear about what you can do for us and how you can add value to our people and our business - reach out and apply today!
